cards.title: Create a Parenting Rota That Works
cards.body: A couple solved constant bickering over household duties by establishing a simple parenting rota system. The structured approach eliminated confusion about who does what and reduced overwhelm after their second child was born.

cards.title: Protecting Your Future Children From In-Laws
cards.body: If your partner's parent is unkind to them, it's wise to minimize contact with future children unless behavior changes significantly. Setting boundaries early protects your family's wellbeing and emotional safety.

cards.title: Teen Sensitivity to Graphic Content Is Normal
cards.body: Being sensitive to disturbing content at 17 isn't a sign of immaturity—it reflects your boundaries and values. Maturity means understanding yourself, not forcing exposure to things that genuinely upset you.

cards.title: How Parental Narcissism Disrupts Child Identity
cards.body: Narcissistic parenting interrupts a child's natural process of developing their own identity and sense of self. Recovery involves reclaiming who you are beyond your parent's influence and criticism.

cards.title: Dealing With Emotionally Neglectful Parents
cards.body: Recognizing what emotionally neglectful parents failed to provide is transformative for adult children. The real question isn't confrontation—it's protecting yourself and building healthy boundaries.

cards.title: Virtual Parents: Young People Seek Online Mentorship
cards.body: A growing trend shows young people turning to 'virtual parents'—content creators who provide support and encouragement online. This phenomenon highlights gaps in real-world parental validation for some teens.
